title: The Broken Script | Revamped Visuals
description: A visual overhaul for The Broken Script!
body:
![A minecraft title saying "The broken script revamped visuals"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/624b934a2d8652220fe045fbbc1f5c68bfedea84.png)                                            

Hey everyone! this pack overhauls a lot of TBS entities models + animations to be a bit more fresh! it also overhauls some other stuff like removing the black bars from the VHS overlay

And credits for our amazing icon go to Bennie :D

## [respackopts](https://modrinth.com/mod/respackopts) is required for the config to work!

# Features

- Adds a new model + new animations for the broken end

- Adds new notexture animations and a minor model change

- Adds overhauled Curved model + animations (Credits for the model go to aureez_echo!)

- Adds a new Circuit model and animations (compatible with tameable circuit addon!)

- Adds a new r2/siluet model with new animations (Credits go to Rupter)

- Overhauls the animated overlay when chased by tbe

- Added a new bsod screen (Credits go to Bennie)

- Removes black bars from the VHS overlay

- Adds a new Hetzer model + animations

- Overhauls the Moonphases! (Credit still goes to Bonfy)

- A config so you can choose which of the features you actually wanna play with

****Download The Broken Script [here](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-broken-script)****
